description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the femtopixel/multiarchbuilder Docker image with a docker:dind service and set the DOCKER_HOST variable to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs only on the master branch. In the build job's before_script run "docker run --rm --privileged multiarch/qemu-user-static:register --reset", clone the manifest-tool repository, checkout tag v0.9.0, build and install it with "make" and "make install", remove the source directory, clone the qemu-static-conf repository, copy its *.conf files into "/lib/binfmt.d", and log in to Docker Hub using the DOCKER_HUB_LOGIN and DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD variables. Then execute "make" in the script step. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
